first_run.rationale: The score is identical, and the reasoning in the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same for both evaluations. The minor differences in phrasing are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the core assessment of the candidate's skills, experience, or fit for the role. The model identifies the same strengths (geospatial experience, distributed systems) and the same weaknesses (lack of recent C++/Rust) for both candidates.
